description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows framed in wood, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is clad in light gray brick, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. A prominent balcony with metal railings and potted plants extends from one side, offering outdoor living space above a garage. The main entrance is marked by a double wooden door, flanked by two decorative potted shrubs and sheltered by a small overhang. The house includes multiple rooms visible through the open roof, with interior walls finished in a lighter stone or brick. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical on the front, with a mix of single and double windows, and the overall structure is two stories tall.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large wood-framed windows, light gray brick exterior, and a balcony above a garage. The design features symmetrical window placement and a prominent wooden entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double wooden doors, symmetrical large windows, and two potted shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, a single window, and the open layout of the interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony with metal railings, potted plants, and the garage door beneath.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the balcony, outdoor furniture, and the garage entrance below.
attribute_entryway_design: Double wooden doors with a small overhang, flanked by potted shrubs and no steps or porch.
